tasks.summary: Add growth areas table to system status page
tasks.description: Update system_status view to query GrowthArea.objects.all().order_by(-composite_score)[:10] and pass to context. Add a table to system.html showing city, state, composite score, landlord score.

acceptance_criteria.description: System page shows growth areas table
Table shows composite score and landlord score

tasks.description: Add /property/compare/?a=<id>&b=<id> view + template. Shows side-by-side KPI cards: NOI, cap rate, cash-on-cash, DSCR, price, rent for both properties. Uses existing KPI computation functions.

acceptance_criteria.description: View returns 404 for IDs not owned by user

tasks.summary: Add CSS timeline to BRRRR calculator
tasks.description: Add a simple CSS-based timeline below the BRRRR calculator results showing rehab, rent-up, and hold phases with duration bars.

acceptance_criteria.description: BRRRR page shows visual timeline with phase bars
